title: Algerian Tagine with Egg
description: A traditional Algerian dish made with egg, tagine, and spices, perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat the dense (olive oil) in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the tagine and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Crack in the egg and scramble it with the tagine.
Stir in the sour (orange juice) and Algerian spice blend.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the egg is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
